programme.desc: Kishan's peaceful life is shattered when he returns home to find an imposter has taken over his identity, leading to a suspenseful journey to uncover the truth.

programme.desc: Sheetal, a stubborn factory owner, marries union leader Raju to tame him, but ends up learning surprising lessons about power, love, and pride.

programme.desc: Trouble ensues when two lookalikes from varying backgrounds fall for the same girl. However, an unsuspecting connection between the duplicates further complicates their situation.

programme.desc: Sarah and Ransh share a common passion for car racing. When their friend Aditya decides to propose to Sarah, he meets with a car crash and dies.
